task_completion.description: Verify that the main trip record is created with the correct name and location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a trip header, folder, or grouping named 'Komodo Safari 2023' with the location set to 'Labuan Bajo, Indonesia' in the dive log application's list or main view.

task_completion.description: Verify the details of Dive 1 (Crystal Rock) are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the first dive's details are visible. Check for: Location 'Crystal Rock', Date 'March 5, 2023', Time '09:00', Duration '52 min', Max Depth '28m', Gas 'Nitrox 32% O2' (with 12L cylinder at 232 bar), Buddy 'Wayan Surya', Tags 'current' and 'drift', and Notes mentioning 'Strong current... Incredible school of barracuda... Drifted along the pinnacle wall'.

task_completion.description: Verify the details of Dive 2 (Castle Rock) are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the second dive's details are visible. Check for: Location 'Castle Rock', Date 'March 5, 2023', Time '14:00', Duration '48 min', Max Depth '25m', Gas 'Air' or '21% O2' (with 12L cylinder at 232 bar), Buddy 'Wayan Surya', Tag 'current', and Notes mentioning 'Mantas spotted at cleaning station'.

task_completion.description: Verify the details of Dive 3 (Batu Bolong) are correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a screenshot where the third dive's details are visible. Check for: Location 'Batu Bolong', Date 'March 6, 2023', Time '08:30', Duration '45 min', Max Depth '32m', Gas 'Nitrox 32% O2' (with 12L cylinder at 232 bar), Buddy 'Adi Pratama', Tags 'deep' and 'wall', and Notes mentioning 'Pristine wall dive... Napoleon wrasse at safety stop'.

task_completion.description: Verify that all three dives are associated with the 'Komodo Safari 2023' trip.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the dive list or logbook view. The three dives (Crystal Rock, Castle Rock, Batu Bolong) should be visually nested under, grouped by, or linked to the 'Komodo Safari 2023' trip header.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a genuine dive logging GUI application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical user interface for dive logging (e.g., Subsurface or similar app) with proper input fields, not a terminal window or a generic text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered data into the correct specific fields rather than dumping everything into a single text box.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that depth, duration, date, time, buddy, and tags are entered into their respective dedicated UI fields or dropdowns, rather than all being pasted together into the 'Notes' field.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by writing a script to generate a log file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the agent clicking through the UI, opening 'Add Dive' dialogs, and typing in fields across the screenshots, rather than just opening a terminal and running a python or bash script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Trip Name: 'Komodo Safari 2023'. Location: 'Labuan Bajo, Indonesia'. Dive 1: 2023-03-05 09:00, Crystal Rock, 52 min, 28m, 32% O2, Buddy: Wayan Surya, Tags: current, drift. Dive 2: 2023-03-05 14:00, Castle Rock, 48 min, 25m, 21% O2, Buddy: Wayan Surya, Tags: current. Dive 3: 2023-03-06 08:30, Batu Bolong, 45 min, 32m, 32% O2, Buddy: Adi Pratama, Tags: deep, wall. All dives use 12L cylinders at 232 bar.
